text: Created a detailed storyboard or script before beginning full production
Obtained SME sign-off on the storyboard before building in the authoring tool
Developed all content assets (slides, video, audio, graphics) per the design document
Built assessment interactions that align to stated learning objectives
Applied consistent visual design (colors, fonts, layout) throughout all materials
Added alt text to all images and visual elements
Captioned all video and audio content
Checked color contrast ratios for accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA)
Conducted alpha review: internal ID peer review for instructional quality
Conducted beta review: SME content accuracy review with tracked revisions
Tested all interactions, branching, and navigation in the authoring tool
Published and tested SCORM/xAPI package in the target LMS environment
Confirmed completion tracking and reporting work as expected in the LMS
